ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Brief description of the party's ideology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 18 to 24) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "voter_count" INTEGER /* Number of voters in the specified demographic */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial distribution */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic distribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of the voter registration event */,
  "voter_count" INTEGER /* Number of voters registered on the specified date */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial distribution */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic distribution */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of newly registered voters */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the registration data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "voter_count" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out on the specified date */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution */,
  "race" TEXT /* Racial distribution */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic distribution */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of voters who turned out */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the turnout data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
